title: Hexr signature pack
description: Declarative framework or pattern signature consumed by the Hexr SDK's Rust analyzer (HEXR_SDK_OVERHAUL_TECH_SPEC.md §17.4). Schema is permissive on framework-specific subtrees and strict only on the core invariants the analyzer relies on for loading.

id.description: Lowercase kebab-case. Validate workflow additionally enforces id == filename stem.

detect.description: Required for kind=framework. Detection rules grouped by AST shape.

idioms.description: Framework-specific idiom mappings (agent, tool, llm_client, orchestrator, agent_spawn, etc.). Permissive: each idiom group is an array of symbol patterns.

adapter.description: Optional adapter config — framework-specific runtime hooks.

suggest.description: Optional L3 ColBERT/MaxSim suggestion config (enterprise profile). Array of {on, decorator|wrap, code} entries OR object form.

match.description: Required for kind=pattern. Structural match rules (e.g. has_loop, min_llm_calls_per_function).

confidence.description: Pattern packs only: base confidence score on match.
